title: Kenyan Curry with Fenugreek and Fenugreek Chutney
description: A flavorful and aromatic Kenyan-inspired curry made with fenugreek and served with a side of tangy fenugreek chutney.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the ginger and garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the mildly spiced lentils and stir to combine.
Add the curry powder and fenugreek seeds and stir to combine.
Add the fenugreek leaves and stir to combine.
Cook for 10-15 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Serve with a side of tangy fenugreek chutney.
To make the chutney, blend together fenugreek leaves, onion, garlic, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Season with salt and adjust to taste.
